parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <TEXT>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL>
    <TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de l'Europe</TITLE>
  </BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daß der Anthor desselben, <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Gixauidenae</AUTHOR>
  </BIBL>, solches mit einem dritten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</TEXT>
</ITEM>

explanation.fix: Added a `<TEXT>` root element to properly encapsulate the main content of the `<ITEM>` tag.
explanation.reason: The content was not wrapped in a semantic tag, which is necessary for structured data.

explanation.fix: Corrected the malformed Unicode character `dau` to `daß` (German sharp 's').
explanation.reason: The original string contained a broken Unicode sequence.

explanation.fix: Corrected the malformed Unicode character `dridten` to `dritten`.
explanation.reason: The original string contained a typo in the word 'dritten'.

explanation.fix: Removed the erroneous number `247.` before the `<AUTHOR>` tag.
explanation.reason: The number was not part of the author's name and disrupted the XML structure.

explanation.fix: Fixed the malformed Unicode character sequence in `<TITLE>` (`` to `e`).
explanation.reason: The original string contained a broken Unicode sequence in the title.
